methodology.classification_source: OpenHands/community-pr-dashboard employee/maintainer config and PR category criteria
methodology.pr_category_rule: bot authors -> bot (openhands-agent is explicitly a bot); tobitege/li-boxuan author overrides -> community; enyst/amanape/saurya/hieptl/raymyers/chuckbutkus/mamoodi/csmith49/aivong-openhands/juanmichelini author overrides -> org; otherwise employee or authorAssociation in MEMBER/OWNER -> org; collaborator-only and other human authors -> community
methodology.primary_metric: completed GitHub PR review events by target reviewers, excluding self-reviews
methodology.secondary_metric: unique PRs reviewed, counting each reviewer once per PR at their first counted review
